# terrible_community_general_hwc_vpc_route (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `destination` (String) Specifies the destination IP address or CIDR block.
- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `next_hop` (String) Specifies the next hop. The value is VPC peering connection ID.
- `vpc_id` (String) Specifies the VPC ID to which route is added.

### Optional

- `state` (String) Whether the given object should exist in Huawei Cloud.
- `type` (String) Specifies the type of route.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) UUID of the route.
